items.title: Clean Heat Market Mechanism: fossil fuel boiler sales, targets and credits
items.summary: How to monitor and report on the sales of fossil fuel boilers. How the low carbon target affects you, when you get credits and how to use them. How to pay for a credit shortfall.

items.title: Notice: Boiler Upgrade Scheme: budget increase, April 2026
items.summary: This notice confirms changes to the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS) in April 2026.

items.title: ​​Improving the energy efficiency of socially rented homes in England
items.summary: ​​This consultation seeks views on government’s proposal to set a minimum energy efficiency standard (MEES) for socially rented homes for the first time.​

items.title: Accredited official statistics: UK greenhouse gas emissions: 2025 provisional figures

items.summary: The Export Control Joint Unit (ECJU) has updated the general trade licence Russia sanctions for sectoral software and technology.

items.title: Guidance: General trade licence Russia sanctions: sectoral software and technology
items.summary: This is a general trade licence in relation to prohibitions under Chapter 4N of the Russia Sanctions regulations on business enterprise software and technology.

items.title: Independent report: Nuclear Decommissioning Authority: 2026 review
items.summary: The government has commissioned an independent review of the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority (NDA) to assess its performance and identify opportunities for improvement.

items.title: Placing CE marked products on the market in the EU
